project_types.display_name: Claude Code / Gemini plugin and skill

completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part with 3 parts (engine, rubric, plugin); user directed the rubric and plugin to be treated as separate from the engine
Found existing docs: README.md, AGENTS.md, docs/{design,axes,versioning,skill-integration}.md, specs/{handoff,personas-correlation-ordering}.md, CHANGELOG.md, rubric/v1/CHANGELOG.md
Tech stack: Python 3.11+, hatchling build, pyyaml + jsonschema runtime, pytest + ruff dev; stdlib-only engine, no framework
Deep read of all 9 engine modules, sample axis.yaml, Makefile, atlas.sh, existing docs. CLI/library type: no api/data-model/UI scans required
Wrote source-tree-analysis.md (annotated tree, entry points, critical dirs per part)
Extracted dev setup, make targets, test approach, release-please flow into development-guide.md
Documented the 4 integration points across 3 parts in integration-architecture.md + project-parts.json
Wrote project-overview.md and remaining supporting docs
Generated master index.md; all expected files exist, no (To be generated) markers
Validated: all internal links resolve, no incomplete markers, 855 lines of generated docs

findings.project_classification: multi-part: engine (Python CLI/library), rubric (YAML data, 13 axes), plugin (Claude Code/Gemini skill)
findings.technology_stack: Python 3.11+, pyyaml, jsonschema, pytest, ruff, hatchling
